scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,user,notification,news,gateway,payment,subscription,admin -c blue,green,yellow,red,magenta,cyan,white,bgBlue "npm run dev -w auth-service" "npm run dev -w user-service" "npm run dev -w notification-service" "npm run dev -w news-service" "npm run dev -w graphql-gateway" "npm run dev -w payment-service" "npm run dev -w subscription-service" "npm run dev -w admin-service"
scripts.install:all: npm install -w auth-service && npm install -w user-service && npm install -w notification-service && npm install -w news-service && npm install -w graphql-gateway && npm install -w payment-service && npm install -w subscription-service && npm install -w admin-service
scripts.migrate:all: npm run migrate -w auth-service && npm run migrate -w user-service && npm run migrate -w notification-service && npm run migrate -w news-service && npm run migrate -w payment-service && npm run migrate -w subscription-service
